item.description:
# Shruti 1.1.7
Smarter Follow-Me and a real Loudness Guard.
- Follow-Me Audio now follows the app you are actually **hearing**, not just the one in front. The focused, playing app (a YouTube video in Chrome, a Spotify track) becomes the hero and everything else drops away. Switch to the app that's playing and the focus moves with you. - By default Follow-Me now **silences** the other apps entirely while you focus. A new Background slider lets you keep them playing quietly underneath instead (0% = muted, up to 100% = untouched). - A short hold keeps the focus through brief silences (a pause between tracks) so the background doesn't flicker. - Loudness Guard is now a genuine peak limiter measured in dBFS: it shaves only the spikes above your chosen ceiling and leaves everything below it untouched, on headphone and AirPods output. It stays off until you switch it on. - Mic Auto-Follow and Auto-Duck are unchanged.
